gold.note: Bright gold (#c8a24a) is the authority signal: AA on dark (7.6:1), but fails as text on light (2.4:1). On light, text-bearing gold steps down to gold-strong (#6f5320); bright gold is non-text only (marker, logo).

gold-strong.note: Light-theme authority signal for any gold carrying text. Set deep (#6f5320) to read on the gilded scope-header surface (#f4ecd6): 6.07:1 there, 6.8:1+ on neutral light. The mid-tone #8a6a2a fails (4.27:1 on gold-soft).

display.purpose: Screen title. One per view, never more.

body.purpose: Paragraph and description. Prose capped 65ch; tables run denser.

label.purpose: Badge, chip, table header. No all-caps.

mono.purpose: IDs, refs, audit strings, UUIDs, scope context values.

themes.switch: [data-theme] attribute on the document element; falls back to prefers-color-scheme when no explicit choice is stored. Attribute always wins over the media query.
themes.note: Two grounds, one role system. Components consume semantic role tokens (--color-bg, --color-text, --color-gold-strong) only; primitives (--dark-*, --light-*) are never consumed directly. Light is a synthesis (Vision 4 has no light mockup), AA-verified, designed to harmonize with POS-Pulse light without owning it.

shadows.name: card-dark
shadows.purpose: Resting card/pane (dark), flooded toward bg hue.

shadows.name: gold-ring
shadows.purpose: Gold-tinted focus ring for scope elements (both themes).

motion.name: duration-2
motion.purpose: Standard: button hover, focus, border, theme swap.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: All exit/in easing. Expo-style. No bounce.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Sidebar hides, top bar gains hamburger.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single action color. One per context. Command Navy fill, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 14px; background: var(--color-primary); border: 1px solid var(--color-primary); border-radius: var(--radius-control); color: #fff; font: 600 var(--text-label)/1 var(--font-sans); letter-spacing: -0.005em; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color var(--duration-2) var(--ease-out); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-primary-hover); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(31,78,122,0.45); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Border-only, inherits surface. Hover borrows the primary border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 14px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-strong); border-radius: var(--radius-control); color: var(--color-text); font: 600 var(--text-label)/1 var(--font-sans); cursor: pointer; transition: border-color var(--duration-2) var(--ease-out), background-color var(--duration-2) var(--ease-out); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: var(--color-primary); background: var(--color-primary-subtle); }

components.name: Theme Toggle
components.description: Top-bar control switching [data-theme] dark<->light, persisted. First load follows prefers-color-scheme (dark default).
components.html: <button class="ds-theme-toggle" aria-label="Switch theme"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="18" height="18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.75" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/><path d="M12 2v2M12 20v2M4.9 4.9l1.4 1.4M17.7 17.7l1.4 1.4M2 12h2M20 12h2M4.9 19.1l1.4-1.4M17.7 6.3l1.4-1.4"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-theme-toggle { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-control); color: var(--color-text-muted); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color var(--duration-2) var(--ease-out), color var(--duration-2) var(--ease-out); } .ds-theme-toggle:hover { background: var(--color-surface-raised); color: var(--color-text); } .ds-theme-toggle:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(46,125,163,0.3); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Recessed well; focus shifts border to teal with a glow, no layout shift.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; min-height: 36px; padding: 6px 12px; background: var(--color-surface-sunken); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-control); color: var(--color-text); font: 400 var(--text-body)/1.5 var(--font-sans); transition: border-color var(--duration-2) var(--ease-out), box-shadow var(--duration-2) var(--ease-out); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-text-disabled); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: var(--color-accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(46,125,163,0.3); outline: none; } .ds-input[aria-invalid="true"] { border-color: var(--color-danger); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(179,46,54,0.25); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard surface. Flat at rest with a structural shadow. No nested cards.
components.html:
Integration Health

42 of 44 connectors reporting. 2 degraded.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--color-surface); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-card); box-shadow: var(--shadow-card); padding: 24px; } .ds-card__title { margin: 0 0 8px; font: 600 var(--text-title)/1.375 var(--font-sans); letter-spacing: -0.005em; color: var(--color-text); } .ds-card__body { margin: 0; font: 400 var(--text-body)/1.5 var(--font-sans); color: var(--color-text-muted); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Pill with a leading status dot. Semantic text tone tuned for AA on the active ground.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; height: 22px; padding: 0 8px; border-radius: var(--radius-pill); font: 600 var(--text-caption)/1 var(--font-sans); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge::before { content: ''; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: currentColor; } .ds-badge--success { background: var(--color-success-surface); color: var(--color-success-on); } .ds-badge--danger { background: var(--color-danger-surface); color: var(--color-danger-on); }

components.name: Navigation Entry
components.description: Sidebar entry. Active state carries the gold marker stripe (the only persistent gold in nav).
components.html: Overview
components.css: .ds-nav-entry { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 8px; color: var(--color-text-muted); text-decoration: none; font: 600 var(--text-label)/1 var(--font-sans); transition: background-color var(--duration-2) var(--ease-out), color var(--duration-2) var(--ease-out); } .ds-nav-entry:hover { background: var(--color-surface-raised); color: var(--color-text); } .ds-nav-entry--active { background: var(--color-primary-subtle); color: var(--color-text); } .ds-nav-entry--active::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 0; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 3px; height: 20px; border-radius: 0 2px 2px 0; background: var(--color-gold-marker); }

components.name: Scope Header
components.description: Persistent gold authority bar answering 'where am I acting'. Gold text is theme-aware (bright #c8a24a on dark, deep #6f5320 on light) for AA on the gilded surface.
components.css: .ds-scope-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 32px; background: var(--color-gold-soft); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(200,162,74,0.18); font: 600 var(--text-label)/1 var(--font-sans); color: var(--color-gold-strong); } .ds-scope-header__crumb { opacity: 0.7; } .ds-scope-header__sep { opacity: 0.4; padding: 0 4px; } .ds-scope-header__current { opacity: 1; }

components.name: Alert Banner
components.description: Full-width persistent operational banner. Never a toast, never auto-dismisses.
components.html: Data-Pulse API is degraded. Some figures may be stale. req: dp2-7f3a91
components.css: .ds-alert { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: var(--radius-md); font: 400 var(--text-body)/1.5 var(--font-sans); border: 1px solid transparent; } .ds-alert--warning { background: var(--color-warning-surface); color: var(--color-warning-on); border-color: rgba(184,118,0,0.3); } .ds-alert__req { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: var(--text-mono); opacity: 0.75; }

components.name: Data Table
components.description: The primary data surface. Hover tints a row; selection tints to gold-soft. Tables over cards for list data.
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; } .ds-table thead tr { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border); } .ds-table th { padding: 12px 16px; text-align: left; font: 600 var(--text-label)/1.25 var(--font-sans); color: var(--color-text-muted); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-table td { padding: 12px 16px; font: 400 var(--text-body)/1.5 var(--font-sans); color: var(--color-text); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border); } .ds-table tbody tr:hover td { background: var(--color-surface-raised); } .ds-table tbody tr.is-selected td { background: var(--color-gold-soft); }

narrative.overview: The Console is the seat from which one operator governs an entire retail platform: tenants, stores, catalog, audit, money. It answers a single question on every screen, where am I acting and is the system healthy, before it answers anything else. Authority reads as a quiet gold signal against a deep navy field; every action reads as navy; the data itself, dense and legible, is the content. This system is dark by default and light by preference: the same role system, components, and rules expressed on two grounds, with only surface and text primitives changing. It explicitly rejects the Bootstrap-era CRUD admin and the bloated SaaS dashboard; the dark navbar is the nearest trap, so disciplined gold-as-authority and real density must out-execute the cliche.
keyCharacteristics: Dark default, AA-compliant light alternate, one shared system across both.
Gold is authority only. Navy drives every action. The two never swap jobs.
Density earns its place: tables over cards, information over whitespace, never clutter.
Scope before action: the active tenant/store context is always legible.
Flat by default; depth is structural, never decorative.

rules.name: The Gold Authority Rule
rules.body: Gold is brand authority, never decoration and never an action. It appears on exactly three things: the logo mark, the scope header, and the active-nav marker. On light, text-bearing gold becomes gold-strong (#6f5320, AA on the gilded scope surface); the bright gold is reserved for the non-text marker and logo.

rules.name: The Two-Ground Rule
rules.body: Light is not a recolor of dark; it is the same role system resolved on a light ground. A token role means the same thing in both themes; only its primitive value differs. Never hardcode a hex where a role token exists, or the toggle breaks.

rules.name: The No-Extremes Rule
rules.body: Never #000 or #fff as a surface. The darkest surface is #0d1520; the lightest is #ffffff reserved for cards only, with the page floor a tinted #f4f7fa. Every neutral carries chroma toward the 236deg hue.

rules.name: The Single-Voice Rule
rules.body: One typeface for the entire product UI. A heading is a heavier weight and tighter tracking of the same family, never a different font. Display faces in labels, buttons, or data are prohibited.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: If a surface has a shadow, it must be because it sits structurally above another surface. Shadow as hover decoration is forbidden. Smell test: if a flat list row gains a drop shadow on hover, the shadow is wrong, use a background tint instead.

dos: Do keep gold to the three authority surfaces only (logo, scope header, active-nav marker), and on light swap text-bearing gold to gold-strong (#6f5320) to hold AA.
Do drive every action with the Command Navy family. One primary button per context.
Do reach for a token role (--color-bg, --color-text), never a raw hex, so the dark/light toggle resolves correctly.
Do prefer a dense, well-organized table to a grid of cards for list data.
Do keep operational state in a persistent banner, not a toast.
Do meet WCAG AA in both themes. Every text/surface pair in this spec is contrast-verified.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: collapse all durations to 0ms.
donts: Don't build the Bootstrap-era CRUD admin: dark navbar with blue primary buttons and a flat wall of tables. We share its dark ground, so we must out-execute it, never resemble it.
Don't build the bloated SaaS dashboard: gradient hero metrics, identical stat-card grids, glassmorphism, generic purple/indigo, decorative animation.
Don't use gold as a button fill, a badge color, or any decorative flourish, in either theme.
Don't use a border-left/border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't nest cards. Group inside a card with a raised-surface section and a divider rule.
Don't animate layout properties, add bounce/elastic easing, or run page-load choreography.
Don't claim or duplicate POS-Pulse's palette; Console-light harmonizes with it but is defined independently.
